raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":1.0,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":1.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":1.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.4","R1.7","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.1":"The delegation is entirely about articulating a gap statement and contribution claim; the thesis that QuPPL occupies a previously unoccupied design-space point must be correctly reconstructed and held up against each foil — failure here collapses the whole positioning.","R1.2":"The three-thread argument must be internally consistent: each prior-work family must genuinely fail to cover the claimed gap, the failures must be non-overlapping, and the synthesis ('bringing these threads together') must follow without logical leaps or circular reasoning.","R1.4":"Novelty assessment is the load-bearing axis of any prior-work positioning; correctly characterizing the delta between QuPPL and general-purpose PPLs, calibration methods, and Bayesian-semantics models is the central intellectual task of this delegation.","R1.7":"A prior-work positioning section lives or dies on citation coverage and accuracy; omitting a directly competing system (e.g., a PPL that already separates referential and world uncertainty) or mischaracterizing a cited research line would invalidate the novelty claim entirely."},"clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":""}

rationale.R1.1: The delegation is entirely about articulating a gap statement and contribution claim; the thesis that QuPPL occupies a previously unoccupied design-space point must be correctly reconstructed and held up against each foil — failure here collapses the whole positioning.
rationale.R1.2: The three-thread argument must be internally consistent: each prior-work family must genuinely fail to cover the claimed gap, the failures must be non-overlapping, and the synthesis ('bringing these threads together') must follow without logical leaps or circular reasoning.
rationale.R1.4: Novelty assessment is the load-bearing axis of any prior-work positioning; correctly characterizing the delta between QuPPL and general-purpose PPLs, calibration methods, and Bayesian-semantics models is the central intellectual task of this delegation.
rationale.R1.7: A prior-work positioning section lives or dies on citation coverage and accuracy; omitting a directly competing system (e.g., a PPL that already separates referential and world uncertainty) or mischaracterizing a cited research line would invalidate the novelty claim entirely.
